top_story.title: Market rally breakdown: Dow Jones, bitcoin, Tesla, and more
top_story.summary: On Friday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average (^DJI) surged over 800 points, while both the S&P 500 (^GSPC) and Nasdaq Composite (^IXIC) gained over 1% each. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a look at the week's biggest market moves, including action from the "Magnificent Seven" (MAGS), semiconductor sector (^SOX), software sector (IGV), CBOE Volatility Index (^VIX), 10-year Treasury yields (^TNX), the US dollar (DX-Y.NYB), bitcoin (BTC-USD), and more.
